name: Gaunts
descriptionTemplate: {Gaunts} are Pontos's Buff Cards, with 3 types: {Raid-Gaunt}, {Vex-Gaunt}, and {Slay-Gaunt}. Conjoined {Gaunts} cost 1 additional Arithmetica, take effect 1 additional time, and count as 2 {Gaunt} cards in the deck. If all {Gaunts} have been upgraded, place 1 {Adv. Insight} with {Destroy} into hand.
